name: 用户表单
appendHead:
<script>
function myBeforeSubmit() {
    console.log('准备提交');
    return true; // 返回 false 可以阻止提交
}

function mySuccessHandler(res) {
    console.log('提交成功', res);
    layer.msg('保存成功！');
}

function myErrorHandler(xhr, status, error) {
    console.error('提交失败', error);
    layer.msg('保存失败！');
}</script>
initExpress: sql.append("   select a.students_id ID ,a.ruxue_date RUXUE_DATE, a.useremail USER_EMAIL,a.username USER_NAME,a.usersex USER_SEX,a.area_id AREA_ID, a.add_time ADD_TIME,group_concat(c.hobbys_id) HOBBYS_IDS from students a left join  rel_students_hobbys rh on rh.students_id=a.students_id left join hobbys c on rh.hobbys_id=c.hobbys_id   where  a.delete_flag=0 and ID=1"); return selectOne(sql);
deleteExpress: update("UPDATE students set delete_flag=1 where students_id=${ID}");

initData.dataSql: select hobbys_id value,name label from hobbys
select hobbys_id value,name label from hobbys
select a.region_id id,a.name  ,a.parent_id from regions a where region_id>1 order by a.region_id
select a.region_id id,a.name  ,a.parent_id from regions a where region_id>1 order by a.region_id
